meaning: vt.使再结合,再加入,再回答vi.重新聚集,回答,答辩
examples: Mimi and her family went off to Tunisia to rejoin her father.
The prime minister of Fiji has said Fiji is in no hurry to rejoin the Commonwealth.
Let us go back again for a moment to the year 1945 and rejoin Chiang Kai-shek in his rock-ribbed refuge at Chungking.
Niklas persuaded Mikael to rejoin the company, and together they sketched out a rescue plan.
Summers will rejoin the Harvard University Economics Department afterr the November elections in 3 weeks.
